headline: Motorola Solutions AI Crime Center Upgrade Raises Questions On Valuation
summary: Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) announced major upgrades to its CommandCentral Aware and CommandCentral RMS platforms. The updates introduce a new mission workspace and timeline in CommandCentral Aware, focused on real-time crime center operations. CommandCentral RMS gains deeper evidence integration, workflow automation, and AI-assisted reporting tools. The company positions these changes as a step forward in AI powered public safety software for law enforcement agencies. For investors...
